sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70651" key="nhktri/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νηκ-τρίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, fem. of <sense id="n70651.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">νήκτης, ν. ἐλαία</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:45" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.45</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κολυμβάς.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
